scripts.build: echo 'Compiling lib-medium-17...' && sleep 1.9 && echo 'Generating types...' && sleep 0.2 && echo 'lib-medium-17 ready!'
scripts.test: echo 'Running lib-medium-17 tests...' && sleep .5 && echo '  Suite: unit - 5 passed' && echo '  Suite: integration - 3 passed'
scripts.dev: echo 'lib-medium-17 watching...' && while true; do sleep 2; echo '[lib-medium-17] rebuilt in 45ms'; done
